'''fapasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focastle|focastle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focastle|focastle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fapasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæpæshæth|fæpæshæth]] || [[word:fæpæshæj|fæpæshæj]] || [[word:fæpæshæsh|fæpæshæsh]] || [[word:fæpæshæ|fæpæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fapapashath|fapapashath]] || [[word:fapapashaj|fapapashaj]] || [[word:fapapashash|fapapashash]] || [[word:fapapasha|fapapasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fapashath|fapashath]] || [[word:fapashaj|fapashaj]] || [[word:fapashash|fapashash]] || [[word:fapasha|fapasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fapafshath|fapafshath]] || [[word:fapafshaj|fapafshaj]] || [[word:fapafshash|fapafshash]] || [[word:fapafshaf|fapafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fapashatha|fapashatha]] || [[word:fapashaja|fapashaja]] || [[word:fapashasha|fapashasha]] || [[word:fapashaka|fapashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fapashath|fapashath]] || [[word:fapashaj|fapashaj]] || [[word:fapashash|fapashash]] || [[word:fapasha|fapasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fapashathal|fapashathal]] || [[word:fapashajal|fapashajal]] || [[word:fapashashal|fapashashal]] || [[word:fapashakal|fapashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fapashathatha|fapashathatha]] || [[word:fapashajaja|fapashajaja]] || [[word:fapashashasha|fapashashasha]] || [[word:fapashaka|fapashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fapashathan|fapashathan]] || [[word:fapashajan|fapashajan]] || [[word:fapashashan|fapashashan]] || [[word:fapashakan|fapashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fapashathaoro|fapashathaoro]] || [[word:fapashajaoro|fapashajaoro]] || [[word:fapashashaoro|fapashashaoro]] || [[word:fapashakaoro|fapashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
